title: WWII veteran turns 100, now one of three centenarians living in Ogden veterans’ home
description: A WWII Navy veteran in Ogden is joining the centenarian club today. He is now in the ranks with two other WWII veterans who reside at George E. Whalen Ogden Veterans Home.

title: A Look At Trade Desk (TTD) Valuation As Earnings Approach And Revenue Skepticism Builds
description:
Board resignation and pre earnings caution
Trade Desk (TTD) heads into its upcoming earnings report under a cautious spotlight, as recent commentary questions whether second half revenue expectations align with fee scrutiny and rising competition from larger tech and AI focused platforms.
See our latest analysis for Trade Desk.
Trade Desk's US$22.47 share price reflects a sharp reset in expectations, with a 7 day share price return of 11.85% contrasting with a 40.37% year to date share price...
